text_block_list.text: …It felt as though time stopped itself. She just said "Another Stay Gold". There's no doubt about it—
…The race you just saw, it resembled the one here, but it was completely different— They definitely existed over there, it was just a single page in their history.
text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
Stay Gold
text_block_list.text: For whatever reason, I've had this ability ever since I was born… Well, there are some parts that are clear and others that aren't.

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text: Today was on the more clear side, having recreated it and all. So did you see it? The "Japan Cup"?
choice_data_list: Yeah, I definitely did…
Yeah, I definitely did…

text_block_list.text: …It was an outrageous story. And yet I was able to experience something unfathomable… experience something real—
choice_data_list: Is this… a past life of yours?
Is this… a past life of yours?

text_block_list.text:
Ah～… I don't think that's the case. 
The me in that world has a different figure and isn't able to speak.
text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
choice_data_list: I-Is that how it is?
I-Is that how it is?

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text: …However, the fact that we both run stays the same. That is absolutely the one connection we have… I can't forget about that starting point.
…Maybe that's why they become much more clear when I run. Those scenes from their side that were intensely… dazzlingly—
text_block_list.name: Stay Gold

text_block_list.text: —Sparkling like gold.
text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
Stay Gold
text_block_list.text:
I love that sensation. 
…That's why I'm here in Tracen.

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text: …Man, it looks like you have no doubts about what I'm saying. Rather, your eyes—
choice_data_list: To be frank, I'm a little excited.

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text:
Haha! You really are weird. Well, that could explain things. 
…First things first, how do you feel after talking to me now, satisfied?
choice_data_list: …What did you mean by retracing their steps?
…What did you mean by retracing their steps?

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text: That's just for fun. The me right now is going at my own pace. And I'm certain because of that, the scenery I'll see will probably change.
choice_data_list: …Just for… fun?

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text: …Anyways, it's about time I get going. If fate has more in store for us, we'll meet again somewhere else—
Walking into the setting sun, I saw her off and then I suddenly thought of something. From what I remember her telling me, that other Stay Gold didn't see much success.
She knows this and yet… she still plans to retrace their steps. If that's her plan then—
—she'll let it happen. She won't let the sudden downpour bother her, and will instead cuts open a path through it with her sharp running, enjoying herself the whole time.
choice_data_list: (That running can do more! I'm certain of it!)

text_block_list.text: …A single thought took root in my heart. What I saw was the potential of the umamusume named Stay Gold…
and a hunch that we journey towards a yet unseen gold.

—On that day, I heard that she's entered into a race. 
So I went to look at that Selection Race.

text_block_list.name: Announcer
text_block_list.text:
They are now approaching the 4th corner! 
Stay Gold is making her move here!

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text: —Alright, here I go!

text_block_list.name: Announcer
text_block_list.text: Stay Gold's at the front! She's still accelerating!! She's breaking away from the pack!! She's strong!! It's Stay Gold!! Stay Gold!!
choice_data_list: (Yeah, I knew it, she's strong—)

text_block_list.name: Announcer
text_block_list.text:
Stay Gold takes 1st place!! Using her powerful running, 
she dominated the Selection Race!!

text_block_list.name: Racing Umamusume
text_block_list.text: Haah… Haah… I-I didn't hear about this… she's way too strong! Wasn't she just a stumbling, class skipping… senpai!?

text_block_list.name: Veteran Trainer
text_block_list.text: In the final stretch she was leaning a little too far to the left, that aside that acceleration! There's no doubt about her talent. I'll go scout her right—

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text:
…Oh, right. This is my first win, ain't it— 
Fufu, haha!

text_block_list.name: Veteran Trainer
text_block_list.text:
Oi, where is she going!? 
She hasn't spoken to anyone yet!
…The first thing the winner did was disappear, and in the ensuing chaos, I had secretly resolved my singular determination.
choice_data_list: (I have to go—)

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text: …Yo.
choice_data_list: You going on another journey?
You going on another journey?

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text: I just showed off what I needed to show off. I'm off to check out their spots again… I'll kill time by playing into the wind. Well, it's just some nostalgic fun.

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text:
…How about you? Don't tell me you 
came all the way here to see me off?
choice_data_list: I have a proposal.

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text: A proposal?… What kind?
choice_data_list: Let me make your journey more interesting.
Let me make your journey more interesting.

text_block_list.text:
I thought about it ever since I saw her running up close. 
Stay Gold is an amazing umamusume who has her own dormant golden qualities.
She lives her life just trying to simply retrace those steps her other version took. While that may certainly hold a beautiful scenery. I just—
choice_data_list: I just feel like that's a waste.
I just feel like that's a waste.

text_block_list.text: She said it herself. This world's Stay Gold and that world's Stay Gold had different figures. With all of that said, she was already walking on her own path.
choice_data_list: When we first met, you said it yourself.
When we first met, you said it yourself.

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text: Since that's the case, let's just go until we reach the spot we're searching. It's just my personal theory, but a journey is a lot more interesting when something unexpected happens.
As a trainer, I want it to come true. I want her to surpass her other self, go as far as she can, and seize a brand new glory. That's why—
choice_data_list: Let's crush the past, and go on a new journey!

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text: …Pft… fufu… haha… hahaha!

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text:
Hahahaha!! 
Oh man, you really got a screw loose!

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text:
…"Let's crush the past" was it? 
I also had such thoughts.
This precious life I have. I once thought that I couldn't take a different path… However, there are quite a few people around here that are connected to those visions.
text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
Stay Gold
text_block_list.text:
I've been thinking about what to do with those influences… 
It's as you said, all of this going that far is unexpected.
choice_data_list: Ah!! Then—

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text: But, I'll just say this now—
—You're going to make a decision now… a tumultuous one… the start of a journey no one has ever seen before.
text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
Stay Gold
text_block_list.text: The dreams you've seen, your wishes, your story… no one will pay any heed to it. This might lead you to ruin.

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text: With all that known, will you still take this journey?
choice_data_list: …I'll take it.

text_block_list.text: I didn't hesitate. Since she already taught me what I needed to do. No matter how unexpected this path of ruin may be—
choice_data_list: How interesting it is, depends on us.
How interesting it is, depends on us.

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text: …So you've decided.

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text:
—Alright, it's time I get going. 
Have my debut preparations ready by the time I'm back.
choice_data_list: Okay, safe travels, Stay Gold.
Okay, safe travels, Stay Gold.

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text:
Just call me Stego. 
I like that name better.

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text:
Do look forward to the souvenir. 
Trainer.

…And off she goes. A small respite… 
towards a small journey.
—The next time she's in front of me, it'll begin.
The journey… of this world's Stay Gold—
